test_result.details: The hypothesis predicts ~1-1.3 bits entropy reduction from 2-3 homophones per letter, but observed entropy (3.8627) shows minimal reduction from true Latin (~4.0), contradicting the core prediction; Zipf scaling preservation supports the hypothesis, but the anomalously high hapax ratio (0.701) is inconsistent with clean homophonic structure.
